Dolphins are highly social animals that have developed sophisticated ways of communicating with each other. Scientists have discovered that dolphins use a combination of clicks, whistles, and body movements to send messages. One of the most remarkable findings is that each individual dolphin has its own unique whistle — a kind of personal name — that it uses to identify itself to the group.
---

---
Urban farming refers to the practice of growing food within city limits — on rooftops, in community gardens, and in unused lots. As cities grow larger, this idea is gaining popularity around the world. One of the key advantages of urban farming is that it reduces the need to transport food over long distances, which cuts transportation costs significantly. Additionally, city residents benefit from having access to fresher vegetables that have not spent days in transit.
---

Sepak Takraw is a traditional sport widely played in Southeast Asia, especially in countries like Thailand, Malaysia, and Indonesia. The game uses a small ball made of woven rattan — a type of natural plant material — which gives it a distinctive look and feel. Players must keep the ball in the air and send it over a net, but they are only allowed to use their feet, knees, chest, and head. Using the hands is strictly against the rules.
---

Learning a new language does not have to be overwhelming. There are three key habits that can make a big difference. First, try to listen to native speakers every day, even for just 15 minutes. Second, keep a vocabulary notebook and review it regularly. Third, speak with a language partner as often as you can. Most importantly, the writer stresses that consistency matters far more than the total number of hours spent in any single study session.
---

【3つのステップ】

2. 単語ノートをつけて定期的に復習する
3. パートナーと話す練習をする

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、ポスターのタイトルとして最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
In today's world, students use digital devices for everything from studying to socializing. However, many young people lack the skills to evaluate whether the information they read online is reliable. A recent survey found that most high school students could not distinguish between reliable news articles and fabricated ones. As misinformation spreads rapidly through social media platforms, the risk of young people being misled is growing. Educational experts argue that schools must go beyond teaching students how to use digital devices and instead focus on helping them develop critical thinking skills for evaluating online content.
---

【ポスターの構成メモ】
タイトル: 【　　　】
・デジタル機器の使い方を知るだけでは不十分
・オンライン情報を批判的に評価する力が必要
・学校教育での取り組みが鍵

ポスターのタイトル【　　　】として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: デジタル機器の安全な使い方

choices.label: B
choices.text: SNSがもたらす情報格差の現状

choices.label: C
choices.text: インターネットと若者の健康問題

choices.label: D
choices.text: 情報を見極める力を育てよう

reasoning_tags: 文章全体のテーマの把握
critical thinking の日本語対応
タイトルの適切な抽象度

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、ポスターのキャッチコピーとして最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
According to the United Nations, approximately one-third of all food produced globally is wasted every year. While large-scale changes in industry are needed, individuals can also make a meaningful difference. Simple daily habits — such as planning meals before shopping, buying only what is needed, and creatively using leftovers — can significantly reduce the amount of food thrown away in a household. The article emphasizes that even small, consistent actions by individual consumers can add up to a major positive impact on the environment.
---

【食品ロス削減ポスターの構成メモ】
キャッチコピー: 【　　　】
・1人の小さな行動が大きな環境変化を生む
・まず食事の計画と残り物の活用から始めよう

キャッチコピー【　　　】として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 食品業界が変われば世界が変わる

choices.label: B
choices.text: あなたの一歩が、地球の未来を変える

choices.label: C
choices.text: 食べ残しをゼロにする法律を今すぐ作ろう

choices.label: D
choices.text: 国連と企業が連携して食品ロスをなくそう

reasoning_tags: キャッチコピーの特性（簡潔・行動喚起）

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、要約メモの空欄に入る筆者の主張として最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
Research consistently shows that people who engage in regular volunteer work report significantly higher levels of personal happiness than those who do not. The act of helping others creates a sense of purpose and meaning that is difficult to find elsewhere. Volunteering also builds strong social connections, as volunteers often form lasting friendships with fellow volunteers and the people they assist. Based on these findings, the author concludes that while volunteering is clearly beneficial to the communities being served, the people doing the helping also gain enormously from the experience.
---

【ボランティアに関する要約メモ】
・根拠1: ボランティアは幸福感を高める
・根拠2: 生きがいと社会的なつながりを生む
・筆者の主張: 【　　　】

メモの【　　　】に入る筆者の主張として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 他者を助けることは、助ける人自身にも大きな恩恵をもたらす

choices.label: B
choices.text: ボランティアは学校教育で義務化すべき社会的責任だ

choices.label: C
choices.text: 幸福感を高めるには趣味よりもボランティアが効果的だ

choices.label: D
choices.text: コミュニティへの貢献こそが人生の最大の目的だ

reasoning_tags: both sides に言及する文章構造

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、要約メモの空欄に入る研究者の結論として最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
A major study published last year found that adults need between 7 and 9 hours of sleep per night to function at their best. The research also showed that people who consistently sleep less than 6 hours per night have a significantly higher risk of developing heart disease, obesity, and depression. The researchers concluded that of all the lifestyle changes a person can make to protect their health, improving sleep quality and maintaining a consistent sleep schedule is among the most powerful and accessible strategies available.
---

【睡眠研究の要約メモ】
・推奨睡眠時間: 1日7〜9時間
・睡眠不足（6時間未満）のリスク: 心臓病・肥満・うつ病
・研究者の結論: 【　　　】

メモの【　　　】に入る内容として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 薬を活用した睡眠時間の確保が最善の方法だ

choices.label: B
choices.text: 睡眠には個人差があるため推奨時間は一概に言えない

choices.label: C
choices.text: 睡眠の質と規則的な睡眠習慣を改善することが健康維持に最も効果的な方法の一つだ

choices.label: D
choices.text: 睡眠不足は個人の意志と努力で解決できる問題だ

reasoning_tags: among the most powerful の読み取り

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、レポートのタイトルとして最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
Over the past year, the city government invested in adding 20 kilometers of dedicated bicycle lanes throughout the urban area. The results were immediate and dramatic: the number of residents cycling to work increased by 35% compared to the previous year. City officials are now planning to expand the bicycle network even further, with the goal of reducing traffic congestion in the city center and lowering carbon emissions from daily commuting.
---

【レポートの構成メモ】
タイトル: 【　　　】
・20kmの自転車専用レーンを整備
・通勤における自転車利用が35%増加
・さらなる拡充で渋滞と排気ガスの削減を目指す

レポートのタイトル【　　　】として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 環境に優しい通勤手段の比較研究

choices.label: B
choices.text: 市内の交通事故減少の要因分析

choices.label: C
choices.text: 自転車の健康効果に関する市民意識調査

choices.label: D
choices.text: 自転車専用レーン整備がもたらす通勤行動の変化

reasoning_tags: 文章全体の因果関係の把握
bike lanes と commuting behavior の対応
タイトルの適切な具体性

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、ポスターの見出しとして最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
Traditional pottery is an important part of the cultural heritage of many regions, but the craft is at risk of disappearing. As fewer young people choose to learn pottery-making, the techniques developed over hundreds of years may be lost within a generation. In response, a nonprofit organization launched a series of workshops aimed at introducing high school students to the basics of hand-building and wheel-throwing. The author argues that teaching traditional crafts to the next generation is not just about preserving skills — it is about ensuring that cultural identity and history are passed down.
---

【伝統陶芸ポスターの構成メモ】
見出し: 【　　　】
・若い世代に伝統陶芸の技術を伝える
・文化的アイデンティティと歴史を次世代へ

ポスターの見出し【　　　】として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 伝統の技を未来へ——次世代への継承

choices.label: B
choices.text: 陶芸で健康に——手仕事の癒し効果

choices.label: C
choices.text: 輸出産業として復活する伝統陶芸

choices.label: D
choices.text: 陶芸教室で新しい趣味を見つけよう

reasoning_tags: 見出しの主題の正確な捉え方

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、要約メモの空欄に入る内容として最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
Since the first moon landing in 1969, humanity has made remarkable progress in space exploration, including sending rovers to Mars. Not everyone agrees that space exploration should remain a priority. Critics argue that the enormous sums of money spent on space programs would be better invested in solving urgent problems here on Earth, such as poverty and climate change. Supporters of space exploration, however, point out that research conducted in space has led to the development of many technologies that benefit everyday life, including GPS navigation systems and advanced medical imaging equipment.
---

【宇宙開発に関する要約メモ】
・これまでの成果: 月探査・火星探査機の送信
・批判的な意見: 地球上の問題解決に資金を使うべき
・支持する意見: 【　　　】

メモの【　　　】に入る内容として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 宇宙開発は軍事技術の発展に不可欠だ

choices.label: B
choices.text: 宇宙研究からGPSや医療診断など日常に役立つ技術が生まれる

choices.label: C
choices.text: 宇宙移住が将来の人口問題の解決策になる

choices.label: D
choices.text: 探査機を送ることで地球外生命体の存在を証明できる

reasoning_tags: benefit everyday life の日本語対応

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、要約メモの空欄に入る筆者の結論として最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
Teenagers today spend an average of four to five hours each day on social media platforms. While social media allows young people to connect with friends, researchers have found a troubling link between heavy social media use and rising levels of anxiety among adolescents. Some studies also suggest that excessive time spent online reduces opportunities for face-to-face interaction, weakening real-world social skills. The author does not suggest banning social media entirely, as this would be impractical. Instead, the author argues that educating young people on how to use social media mindfully and in moderation is a far more realistic and effective approach.
---

【SNSと若者についての要約メモ】
・現状: 10代が1日4〜5時間SNSを使用
・問題点: 不安感の増加・対面コミュニケーション力の低下
・筆者の結論: 【　　　】

メモの【　　　】に入る筆者の結論として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: SNSの利用を法律で禁止することが最善の解決策だ

choices.label: B
choices.text: SNSは有害なので10代には使わせるべきではない

choices.label: C
choices.text: SNSの使い方を意識的・節度を持って学ばせることが現実的で効果的だ

choices.label: D
choices.text: 対面コミュニケーションの授業時間を増やすことが最優先課題だ

reasoning_tags: mindfully / in moderation の読み取り

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、要約メモの空欄に入る内容として最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
In recent years, a growing number of schools have introduced outdoor environmental education programs. These programs take students outside the classroom to observe local ecosystems, measure water quality in nearby streams, and monitor wildlife in school gardens. Research shows that students who participate in hands-on environmental education develop a stronger sense of environmental responsibility than those who only study the topic from textbooks. The article argues that giving young people direct experiences with nature is not just an extra activity — it is a vital part of building the next generation of informed and motivated environmental stewards.
---

【環境教育についての要約メモ】
・近年の動向: 屋外体験学習プログラムの普及
・研究結果: 体験型学習が環境への責任感を高める
・文章のテーマ: 【　　　】

メモの【　　　】に入る文章全体のテーマとして最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: 環境破壊が生態系に与える深刻な影響

choices.label: B
choices.text: 学校の授業時間確保のための制度改革

choices.label: C
choices.text: 自然観察を通じた生物多様性の科学的研究

choices.label: D
choices.text: 自然体験教育が次世代の環境保護意識を育てる重要性

reasoning_tags: 文章全体の主張の把握

subject: 英語
unit: メモ・ポスター穴埋め
question:
次の文章を読んで、図書館ポスターのキャッチコピーとして最も適切なものを選びなさい。

---
Community libraries have long served as more than just places to borrow books. In addition to offering free access to a wide range of books and digital resources, modern libraries host a variety of community events. Reading clubs, skill-building workshops, children's storytelling sessions, and career counseling services are just some of the programs available to residents of all ages. The author argues that in an era of increasing social isolation, libraries play an irreplaceable role as community hubs where people of all backgrounds can come together, learn new skills, and support one another throughout their lives.
---

【図書館ポスターの構成メモ】
キャッチコピー: 【　　　】
・すべての人に開かれた学びとつながりの場
・地域の人々をむすび、生涯学習を支える

キャッチコピー【　　　】として最も適切なものを選べ。

choices.label: A
choices.text: みんなの学びとつながりの場——あなたの図書館

choices.label: B
choices.text: 本を読んで、知識を深め、試験に勝とう

choices.label: C
choices.text: 読書で世界一周——図書館で冒険しよう

choices.label: D
choices.text: デジタル時代に本の力を見直そう

reasoning_tags: 文章全体のメッセージとの整合
